Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 16th, 2009 (Wide) by Overture Films
International Releases: August 26th, 2024 (Limited), released as Giustizia Privata (Re-release) (Italy)
Video Release: February 16th, 2010 by Overture Films/Anchor Bay
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody brutal violence and torture, a scene of rape, and pervasive language.
Running Time: 118 minutes
Plot point: C.I.A., Revenge, Sex Crimes, Solitary Confinement, Vigilante

Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
